description: Record debug sessions, commands, failed attempts, and successful fixes in local SQLite storage.
name: io.github.oaslananka/debug-recorder-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Override the SQLite database location for local debug history.
environmentVariables.name: DEBUG_RECORDER_DB

environmentVariables.description: Set the minimum structured log level: debug, info, warn, or error.
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Override the Fuse.js threshold used during fuzzy reranking.
environmentVariables.name: FUZZY_THRESHOLD

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to redact common secret patterns before persisting debug text.
environmentVariables.name: DEBUG_RECORDER_REDACT_BEFORE_STORE

environmentVariables.description: HTTP bind host for optional Streamable HTTP mode. Defaults to 127.0.0.1.
environmentVariables.name: HOST

environmentVariables.description: HTTP port for optional Streamable HTTP mode.
environmentVariables.name: PORT

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for optional Streamable HTTP mode. Required for non-loopback bind.
environmentVariables.name: DEBUG_RECORDER_HTTP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated HTTP Host allowlist for optional Streamable HTTP mode.
environmentVariables.name: DEBUG_RECORDER_ALLOWED_HOSTS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated Origin allowlist for optional Streamable HTTP mode.
environmentVariables.name: DEBUG_RECORDER_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum JSON body size for optional Streamable HTTP mode.
environmentVariables.name: DEBUG_RECORDER_MAX_BODY_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: Must be true to allow optional Streamable HTTP mode to bind outside loopback.
environmentVariables.name: DEBUG_RECORDER_REMOTE_HTTP

title: MCP Debug Recorder
